summary: Task 1.1: Restructured navItems in PetProfileNav.tsx. New order: Overview, Health Records (path /documents, file icon), Health Profile (path /health, heartbeat icon), DIVIDER, Care Team, DIVIDER, Timeline (path /activity, clock icon). Introduced a NavEntry union type (NavItem | NavDivider) so dividers can be interspersed in the entries array. Desktop sidebar renders dividers as .pet-profile-nav-divider elements. Mobile pill row iterates over items-only (dividers filtered out). Added .pet-profile-nav-divider CSS rule in index.css. Updated SECTION_LABELS in PetDetail.tsx to match new names. Task 3.3: Replaced 'Access' button with 'Share Profile' (share icon, btn-ghost visual weight), replaced 'Share Card' with 'Send Card' (send/paper-plane icon, btn-ghost visual weight — matching Share Profile), removed 'Delete' button from UI while keeping handleDeletePet handler function intact.
notes_for_reviewer: Pre-existing TypeScript errors exist in frontend/src/components/document-import/DocumentImportSection.tsx — unrelated to this task. No errors in any of the files I changed.
Both Share Profile and Send Card now use btn-ghost + border style for equal visual weight, replacing the previous asymmetric ghost/accent pairing.
Route paths in App.tsx are unchanged — only labels changed.
Dividers are intentionally omitted from the mobile pill row per spec.
